title: Good docs run failed verification because the runner summary said CI-safe
description: A docs-only run made the intended README fix and passed the configured verification commands, but the overall run still failed because claim verification rejected the phrase `CI-safe` in the runner summary.
reproductionNotes: Run `pnpm gdh run runs/fixtures/dogfood/readme-benchmark-tier-note.md --runner codex-cli --approval-mode fail --json` and compare `verification.result.json` with the recorded runner summary and claim checks.
suspectedCause: The unsupported-certainty matcher is too broad for benign evidence-qualified wording in runner narration.
